title: About Kilordle
description: Kilordle is a large-scale Wordle-inspired browser puzzle where one guess plays across many hidden words at once.

sections.title: What It Is
paragraphs: Kilordle keeps the familiar five-letter word guessing loop and scales it into a multi-board challenge. Each submitted word is compared with every active puzzle, so one guess can make progress across the whole board.
The homepage hosts the original interactive game. This page exists to explain the project and give the site a clearer structure for players and search engines.

sections.title: How The Site Is Built
paragraphs: The game itself runs as a client-rendered React app. The supporting pages and text around the game are generated into static HTML during the build.
